project_type: Data Science / ML project - Jupyter notebooks for UMKM location intelligence system
build_system: pip for packages, jupyter/nbformat for notebook creation, nbconvert for HTML export
test_framework: Notebooks are validated by executing them end-to-end with nbconvert --execute
build_command: pip install pandas numpy scikit-learn xgboost lightgbm scipy matplotlib seaborn nbformat nbconvert jupyter-client ipykernel
verification_instructions: 1. Install all required Python packages. 2. Execute Notebook 01 to generate data. 3. Execute subsequent notebooks in order. 4. Verify data/ and models/ directories contain expected outputs.
snapshot_or_generated_files: data/*.csv, data/*.parquet, models/*.joblib - generated by running notebooks. Also docs/*.html from nbconvert.
setup_instructions: pip install pandas numpy scikit-learn xgboost lightgbm scipy matplotlib seaborn shapely nbformat nbconvert jupyter-client ipykernel
environment_constraints: Python 3.9 available. OPEN_INTERNET mode - can install any packages. No PySpark/Synapse - use standard Python pandas. Notebooks written as .ipynb JSON files using nbformat.
contribution_requirements: Notebooks must be executable end-to-end. Data generated in Notebook 01 saved to data/ directory, consumed by subsequent notebooks. Models saved to models/ directory.
key_patterns: Current notebooks use PySpark (to be replaced with pandas). Azure Static Web Apps deploys index.html and docs/ directory. .gitignore excludes .csv and .parquet files.
relevant_files: .gitignore (excludes .csv/.parquet - need to adjust for data/ directory)
index.html (landing page - to be updated for new notebooks)
directory_structure: notebooks/ - Jupyter notebooks, docs/ - HTML exports, .github/workflows/ - Azure Static Web Apps CI/CD, data/ (new - for generated data), models/ (new - for saved models)
